Package neqsim.mcp.runners

Class HAZOPStudyRunner

java.lang.Object
neqsim.mcp.runners.HAZOPStudyRunner
public final class HAZOPStudyRunner extends Object
MCP runner for simulation-backed HAZOP study generation.

The runner bridges document-derived HAZOP nodes, a NeqSim process definition, automatic equipment-failure scenario generation, and optional barrier-register handoff. It is intended for agent workflows that extract nodes and safeguards from STID/P&ID documents, build or retrieve a ProcessSystem, and need a first-pass IEC 61882 worksheet with simulation evidence.

Version:
1.0
Author:
ESOL

  • Method Details

    • run

      public static String run(String json)
      Runs a simulation-backed HAZOP study from JSON input.
      Parameters:
      json - JSON containing a process definition, optional nodes, failure modes, and barrier register
      Returns:
      JSON string with worksheet rows, simulation results, and report markdown

    • buildStudyContext

      private static HAZOPStudyRunner.StudyContext buildStudyContext(com.google.gson.JsonObject input, String studyId)
      Builds the full HAZOP study context from input JSON.
      Parameters:
      input - input JSON object
      studyId - study identifier
      Returns:
      populated study context

    • buildOutput

      private static com.google.gson.JsonObject buildOutput(com.google.gson.JsonObject input, HAZOPStudyRunner.StudyContext context)
      Builds the output JSON for a populated study context.
      Parameters:
      input - original input JSON
      context - populated study context
      Returns:
      output JSON object

    • runScenarios

      private static Map<String,AutomaticScenarioGenerator.ScenarioRunResult> runScenarios(HAZOPStudyRunner.StudyContext context, AutomaticScenarioGenerator generator, List<ProcessSafetyScenario> scenarios)
      Runs generated scenarios when requested by the input.
      Parameters:
      context - study context with process and options
      generator - automatic scenario generator
      scenarios - generated scenarios
      Returns:
      map from scenario name to scenario result

      input - HAZOP study input JSON
      Returns:
      process JSON string suitable for ProcessSystem.fromJsonAndRun(String)

      process - built process system
      Returns:
      list of HAZOP nodes

      consequence text

    • buildRow

      private static com.google.gson.JsonObject buildRow(String studyId, int rowNumber, HAZOPStudyRunner.HazopNode node, AutomaticScenarioGenerator.EquipmentFailure failure, HAZOPTemplate.GuideWord guideWord, HAZOPTemplate.Parameter parameter, String consequence, String safeguards, String recommendation, AutomaticScenarioGenerator.ScenarioRunResult result)
      Builds one worksheet row JSON object.
      Parameters:
      studyId - study identifier
      rowNumber - one-based row number
      node - HAZOP node
      failure - equipment failure
      guideWord - HAZOP guideword
      parameter - HAZOP parameter
      consequence - consequence text
      safeguards - safeguard text
      recommendation - recommendation text
      result - scenario run result
      Returns:
      row JSON object
